what_happened: Missed a planned delivery because the task scope expanded mid-build.
root_cause: No scope boundary defined before implementation; added extras while coding.
prevention: Write a must-have vs nice-to-have list before starting and freeze scope for v1.
lesson: Execution speed depends more on scope control than coding speed.

what_happened: Entered a position without a written invalidation level.
root_cause: Acted on momentum signal without predefining risk size.
prevention: Require a written max-loss rule before any entry.
lesson: If risk is not specified before entry, position size is already wrong.
